evals.name: explicit-a1-pla-0.2mm
evals.prompt: I've got an STL at /tmp/cube.stl that I want to print on my Bambu Lab A1 mini (0.4mm nozzle). Slice it at a 0.2mm layer height in PLA and give me the printable .gcode.3mf.
evals.expected_output: A .gcode.3mf sliced for the A1 mini (0.4 nozzle, 0.20mm, PLA) containing Metadata/plate_1.gcode.

evals.name: implicit-ready-to-print
evals.prompt: Can you get /tmp/cube.stl ready to print on my A1 mini? I just need the sliced file I can send to the printer.
evals.expected_output: A .gcode.3mf sliced for the A1 mini using sensible defaults (0.4 nozzle, ~0.2mm, PLA), containing Metadata/plate_1.gcode.

evals.name: fine-0.12mm-layer
evals.prompt: Slice /tmp/cube.stl for the A1 mini but use a fine 0.12mm layer height — give me the .gcode.3mf.
evals.expected_output: A .gcode.3mf sliced for the A1 mini at 0.12mm layer height, containing Metadata/plate_1.gcode.
